title: Relic Of Nowruz
description: Relic Of Nowruz for Better Survival
body:
☀ Relic Of Nowruz - یادگار نوروز ☀

Nowruz is a cherished part of Persian history, and to celebrate it, I’ve created a small but meaningful Minecraft mod for Persian-speaking players. Relic of Nowruz brings cultural elements into survival mode, offering unique and rewarding experiences!

🌟 Features:

📕 Divan of Hafez – Try your luck with a fortune! Will fate bring you good or bad luck? Listen carefully to the messages hidden within.

🐟 Fish Bowl – Need a reliable food source? Keep your fish well-fed, or they may perish! In return, they will provide you with a daily supply of fish as long as you care for them.

🌾 Nowruz Sabzeh – A symbol of purity and renewal. Water it daily, or it will wither in 7 days. In return, it rewards you with a golden apple every day!

🔥 Beta Release:

The mod is currently in beta, and you can play it now! If it receives enough support, more fortunes and ancient artifacts will be added in future updates! 🌹💖

NOTICE :

Make Sure to Use Forge 1.20.1 47.2.23

and 

Put Geckolib 1.20.1 4.7.1.1

Download Geckolib : Geckolib Download
